emails.subject: Re: Rebecca Smith
emails.body: Agree completely. Notion I had was that we give Rebecca the slides, tell her the story on background, then she trots off to interview McNeally, Ellison, etc. Just a thought. Might be easier, faster channel that achieves the quick action/message we're looking for. James D Steffes 10/05/2000 08:30 PM

emails.subject: Re: Rebecca Smith
emails.body: Jeff Let's see if we can get material to Lay or Skilling to call McNeally this week (Oct 9) so that we ask if they'll talk with Rebecca by Oct 15. ?What exactly do we need to give to Lay or Skilling before the call? ?What will Enron send to McNeally if he agrees? ?Do we have all of this? Jim Jeff Dasovich 10/06/2000 09:55 AM ? ?

emails.subject: Re: Rebecca Smith
emails.body: Seems that we could provide Lay/Skilling with the power point slides as prep for any calls. As a starter, it would be useful to provide McNeally with a letter that he could send to federal and state decision makers. Best, Jeff James D Steffes 10/06/2000 06:47 PM
